title: Clippit word consolidate result
description: Result payload of `clippit word consolidate` written to stdout in JSON mode.

original.description: Absolute path of the original .docx file, or '<stdin>' when read from stdin.

file.description: Absolute path of the revision file, or '<stdin>' when read from stdin.

revisor.description: Reviewer name used for tracked revisions from this document.

color.description: Hex color (#RRGGBB) assigned to this reviewer's tracked changes.

output.description: Absolute path of the consolidated output file, or '<stdout>' when written to stdout.

outputSize.description: Size of the consolidated output .docx file in bytes.
